title: Porbandar Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Porbandar Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Gujarat

overview.short: Porbandar Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in the Porbandar District of Gujarat state, India, which was dedicated in 1988.
overview.description: Porbandar Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in the Porbandar District of Gujarat state, India, which was dedicated in 1988. It is the only bird sanctuary in Gujarat that provides legal protection to the birds which nest there. It is small, only covering 9.33 hectares (0.0933 km2). The sanctuary has a lake attracting migratory birds and other birds such as teals, fowls, flamingos, ibis and curlews.

topPlaces.name: Sudama Mandir Porbandar
topPlaces.description: The Sudama Mandir is a prominent Hindu temple situated in Porbandar, Gujarat, India. It is dedicated to Sudama, the legendary childhood friend of Krishna.

topPlaces.name: Porbandar
topPlaces.description: Porbandar is a city and the headquarters of the Porbandar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is the birthplace of Mahatma Gandhi and Sudama.

topPlaces.name: Kirti Mandir, Porbandar
topPlaces.description: Kirti Mandir is a small museum at the birthplace of Mohandas Karamchand Gandhi in the city of Porbandar, Gujarat, India, memorializing him and his wife, Kasturba Gandhi. The museum displays items used by Gandhi, life size paintings of Kasturba and Gandhiji by Shri Yutt along with some old photographs, and houses a library of books either written by Gandhi or relating to his philosophies.

topPlaces.name: Porbandar State
topPlaces.description: Porbandar State was a princely state during the British Raj ruled by Jethwa dynasty. It was one of the few princely states with a coastline.It was a first class Princely State with 13 Gun Salute, standing fourth in rank among the Principalities in the Kathiawar Agency.

topPlaces.name: Arya Kanya Gurukul
topPlaces.description: Arya Kanya Gurukul situated at Porbandar, Gujarat, is a girls K-12 boarding school in India.

topPlaces.name: INS Sardar Patel
topPlaces.description: INS Sardar Patel is a naval base of the Indian Navy in Porbandar, Gujarat and the Station Headquarters of Naval Station, Porbandar. It provides the logistic support to the Indian Navy units deployed in the Northern Arabian Sea, including along the International Maritime Boundary Line with Pakistan.

topPlaces.name: Chhaya, India
topPlaces.description: Chhaya is a city and a Municipal corporation in Porbandar district in the state of Gujarat, India. Chhaya and Porbandar are the twin cities of each other and both cities are jointly governed by Porbandar–Chhaya Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Odadar
topPlaces.description: Odadar is a coastal village 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Porbandar, in the state of Gujarat, India. It has a population of around 4000 and is known for the many stone quarries in its vicinity.

items.note: The Sudama Mandir is a prominent Hindu temple situated in Porbandar, Gujarat, India. It is dedicated to Sudama, the legendary childhood friend of Krishna.
Porbandar is a city and the headquarters of the Porbandar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is the birthplace of Mahatma Gandhi and Sudama.

Kirti Mandir is a small museum at the birthplace of Mohandas Karamchand Gandhi in the city of Porbandar, Gujarat, India, memorializing him and his wife, Kasturba Gandhi. The museum displays items used by Gandhi, life size paintings of Kasturba and Gandhiji by Shri Yutt along with some old photographs, and houses a library of books either written by Gandhi or relating to his philosophies.

Porbandar State was a princely state during the British Raj ruled by Jethwa dynasty. It was one of the few princely states with a coastline.It was a first class Princely State with 13 Gun Salute, standing fourth in rank among the Principalities in the Kathiawar Agency.
Arya Kanya Gurukul situated at Porbandar, Gujarat, is a girls K-12 boarding school in India.

INS Sardar Patel is a naval base of the Indian Navy in Porbandar, Gujarat and the Station Headquarters of Naval Station, Porbandar. It provides the logistic support to the Indian Navy units deployed in the Northern Arabian Sea, including along the International Maritime Boundary Line with Pakistan.

Chhaya is a city and a Municipal corporation in Porbandar district in the state of Gujarat, India. Chhaya and Porbandar are the twin cities of each other and both cities are jointly governed by Porbandar–Chhaya Municipal Corporation.
Odadar is a coastal village 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Porbandar, in the state of Gujarat, India. It has a population of around 4000 and is known for the many stone quarries in its vicinity.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Porbandar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Porbandar Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Porbandar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Porbandar Airport (4 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (140 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Porbandar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Porbandar Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Porbandar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Porbandar Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Porbandar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sudama Mandir Porbandar, Porbandar, Kirti Mandir, Porbandar, Porbandar State, Arya Kanya Gurukul.
